calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Anne Acuna Esq. appeared for plaintiff Lloyd Frisbie, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant SVI Corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on January 23, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at Default Prove-Up Hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, May 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Lloyd Frisbie, and against the Defaulted Defendant: SVI Corporation as follows:

Accrued Interest - $142.38.
Costs $189.40, for a total of $331.78.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
